summary: Iteration 78 - Comprehensive i18n translation audit. All tested pages (AboutPage, PricingPage, UserProfilePage, ProductsPage, PostViewer) are fully translated in ES/EN. Language switching via localStorage works correctly. Health check API returns 200 with db:connected.

issues: Product images showing broken placeholder icons - Cloudinary URLs may be missing

passed_tests: About page (/about) ES: All sections translated - hero, stats, features, audience bullet points, CTAs
About page (/about) EN: All sections correctly showing English translations
Pricing page (/pricing) ES: Tagline, title, subtitle, plan labels, commission notes all translated
User profile page (/user/user_test123) ES: Stats labels (publicaciones/seguidores/siguiendo) correctly translated
User profile page: Tab labels (PUBLICACIONES, ME GUSTA) in Spanish
Products page (/products) ES: 'vendidos' showing for sold count, filters, buttons all translated
PostViewer modal: 'me gusta' label correctly showing in Spanish
Language switching: localStorage hispaloshop_language=es/en triggers correct translations
Header navigation: Productos, Tiendas, Certificados, Iniciar Sesion all translated in ES mode
Audience section bullet points: No hardcoded English - all buyer/seller/influencer points translated
critical_code_review_comments: All tested pages properly using useTranslation() hook from react-i18next
Translation keys are well-organized in sections: pages.about, pricing, social
LocaleContext properly syncs with localStorage for language persistence
data-testid attributes present on key elements for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified comprehensive i18n translations: 1) AboutPage - all sections translated including hero, stats (Paises/Verificados/Envio), features, audience bullet points. 2) PricingPage - title, plans, commission labels, trial notes all translated. 3) UserProfilePage - stats (publicaciones/seguidores/siguiendo), tab labels translated. 4) ProductsPage - 'vendidos' for sold count, filters, buttons translated. 5) PostViewer - 'me gusta' label works. 6) Language switching via localStorage works (set hispaloshop_language to 'es' or 'en' before page load).
